englishDefinitions: A phrase used to describe a wild, rebellious lifestyle associated with rock music and youth culture.
A shorthand for excess, partying, and the stereotypical image of rock-and-roll life.
persianTranslation: زندگیِ پر از خوشگذرانی و افراط
examples: The movie shows the classic sex, drugs, rock and roll image of the 1970s.
He quit the sex, drugs, rock and roll lifestyle before it ruined his health.
Not every musician lives the sex, drugs, rock and roll stereotype.
